goal: 全面调研 8 个参考项目，评估 DeepSeek-Reasonix Go 版本作为上游的可行性

summary.key_finding: DeepSeek-Reasonix main-v2 is Go 1.25 + bubbletea v2, has complete feature set
summary.decision_pending: Fork Reasonix vs continue Go vs Rust rewrite

deepseek-reasonix.key_features: Agent loop, tool system, memory, skill, hook, permission, sandbox, LSP, MCP

pi.key_features: Pure function agent loop, EventStream, tool hooks

oh-my-pi.key_features: Harmony leak fix, OpenTelemetry, append-only context

codex.key_features: OS-level sandbox, Starlark policies, MCP server mode

CodeWhale.key_features: Tree-structured sessions, RwLock parallel, hook sinks

opencode-dev.key_features: Effect-TS architecture, 150+ tests, Mock LLM Server

opencode-pty.key_features: PTY management, background processes, notification system

deepcode-cli.key_features: LLM-based edit matching, Karpathy Guidelines, snippet system
